import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useQuery } from 'react-query'; import { footwearAPI } from '../services/api'; import { ShoppingBag, Star, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; const Home = () => { const { data: footwearData, isLoading } = useQuery( ['footwear', 'featured'], () => footwearAPI.getAll({ limit: 6 }), { staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000, // 5 minutes } ); const featuredFootwear = footwearData?.footwear || []; return (

); }; export default Home;
